Appearances:
Plaintiff Shao Xian Tang is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendants Rosa Stevens and Manuel Guerrero are present.
Attorney Frederick Fields appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 13, 2016 remains on calendar.
